headline: The Rich Get Richer, You Pay
subtext: While corporate profits soar, your wages stagnate. The system is rigged.
style_description: A hyper-realistic but impossible scene, stark, high contrast, evoking a sense of oppressive scale and injustice.
image_prompt: Hyper-realistic, cinematic wide shot of an impossibly tall, sleek skyscraper, its entire structure composed of shimmering gold coins, meticulously stacked and polished, reflecting a dark, stormy twilight sky. The colossal tower casts a deep, oppressive shadow over a vast, arid, cracked earth. At the base of the golden monolith, dwarfed and barely visible in the shadows, are a cluster of crumbling, identical, windowless concrete boxes, representing impoverished worker housing. A single, weathered, exhausted hand, emerging from the deep shadows at the base, reaches weakly towards the gleaming, unapproachable golden tower. The atmosphere is heavy, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, with sharp contrasts between the lustrous gold and the deep, inky shadows. Ultra-high definition, professional photography, unsettling, stark, thought-provoking.
